data.title: Robust Authentication
data.description: Uses multi-factor authentication (MFA) to enhance security.

data.title: Encryption Standards
data.description: Employs industry-standard encryption for data protection.

data.title: Advanced Threat Protection
data.description: Uses Microsoft's own threat detection technologies to identify and mitigate attacks.

data.title: Zero Trust Architecture
data.description: Adopts a zero-trust approach to network management to ensure security.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts frequent audits to identify and patch vulnerabilities.
